reading.title: Reading: Notable people
reading.passage: She is the woman who won a major award last year. I know a runner who has competed in many countries. He is an engineer who works for a big company. I have a friend who works at that company too.

questions.question: The woman won an award last year.
questions.explanation: "She is the woman who won a major award last year."

questions.question: What does the engineer do?
questions.explanation: "He is an engineer who works for a big company."

reading.title: Reading: A special place
reading.passage: This is the café where we first met. I remember the day when we started this project. That is the building which was designed by a famous architect. I will never forget the moment when we won the prize.

questions.question: The writer met someone at a café.
questions.explanation: "This is the café where we first met."

questions.question: Who designed the building?
questions.explanation: "That is the building which was designed by a famous architect."
